title: Robert Pope
text: Home * People * Robert Pope Robert Pope , an American computer chess programmer, and author of the WinBoard compliant chess engines Beaches [1] , an open source engine of a mixed bitboard with mailbox approach, and more recently, Abbess , based on Magic Bitboards [2] .
